title: epipactis helleborine subsp. leptochila
intro: Epipactis helleborine subsp. leptochila, also known as the slender helleborine or green helleborine, is a rare and lesser-known subspecies of the orchid Epipactis helleborine, which is a type of terrestrial orchid found in Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce swelling and protect cells from damage. The health benefits of Epipactis helleborine subsp. leptochila include its potential to aid in the treatment of various conditions, such as bronchitis, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce the risk of infections. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared for medicinal use by making infusions, decoctions, or tinctures from its roots, which can be used to treat a range of health problems.
